context: Mexico's 2015 chart was split between international reggaeton dominance and a thriving regional Mexican scene anchored by Banda MS and the late Ariel Camacho's sierreño revolution. 'El Perdón' by Nicky Jam and Enrique Iglesias ruled the year with 30 weeks at number one on Hot Latin Songs. Romeo Santos consolidated his bachata dominance while J Balvin began his ascent to global Latin urban stardom.

tracks.title: Lean On
tracks.artist: Major Lazer & DJ Snake feat. MØ

tracks.title: Volveré a Amarte
